metadata.fixture: Streakly (synthetic SvelteKit habit tracker); base + per-snapshot overlay (design/streakly.pen + docs/DESIGN-TAXONOMY.md). .pen fixtures generated headless via fixtures/_lib/pen-build.sh; frame inventory extracted to design/streakly.frames.txt via the Pencil CLI at compose time.
metadata.isolation: one general-purpose subagent per case, isolated composed workdir, skill read from SKILL.md (loaded plugin not invoked), NO Pencil desktop app / MCP — graders read the markdown index + CLI-extracted frames.txt; no dev server / npm / browser / network
metadata.result: 14/14 cases pass; 40/40 expectations pass (T3+V1 from run 20260625-164408 on claude-opus-4-8[1m]; T1+T2+T4+V2 from run 20260707-110633 on claude-fable-5[1m])

expectations.text: Validates I1, finds exactly one [final] (B), does not block
expectations.evidence: one [final] nQjWk Synced; I1 passes; proceeded

expectations.text: Does not treat [anchor]/[deprecated] as implementable spec
expectations.evidence: implemented against [final] B only; anchor/deprecated excluded

expectations.text: Proceeds to implement (no taxonomy-invalid refusal)
expectations.evidence: built /habits store+route+components (6 src files)

runs.notes: Also held token discipline (added missing --motion-flame, used content-width formula) and synced docs — consistent with code-agent's design-code contract.

expectations.text: Phase 0c passes I1/I2/I3 — no block
expectations.evidence: 1 [final], 1 [anchor], 0 loose candidates; all pass

expectations.text: Identifies [anchor] (Warm Ember) as direction anchor and [final] as pattern source
expectations.evidence: named both by role; no mirror baseline (not a redesign)

expectations.text: Does not copy content/inventory from reference frames
expectations.evidence: reference = proportion/feel only; content from docs

runs.notes: Bonus-correct: flagged that the requested NEW feature has no WEEKLY-STATS-IDEAS.md, so the feature-doc preflight (separate from the invariant gate) would route to /design-explore before Phase 1. Invariant gate itself is green = proceed, as expected.

expectations.text: Phase 0d validates I1 (one [final]) — no block
expectations.evidence: one [final]; I1 passes

expectations.text: Picks the [final]+Synced frame as comparison baseline
expectations.evidence: selected nQjWk (B: Single-column card stack), Synced

expectations.text: Detects two [final] for Habit Tracker — I1 violation
expectations.evidence: cited RBqcO (Not started) + C87F8 (Synced); both in index + frames.txt

expectations.text: STOPS and surfaces rather than guessing which [final] is authoritative
expectations.evidence: refused to act on the 'replace' hint; asked user to resolve

expectations.text: Writes no source files; asks to resolve before implementing
expectations.evidence: files-modified = none; instructed deprecate the non-current final

expectations.text: Phase 0c invariant check fails on I1 and blocks
expectations.evidence: two [final] (C87F8/RBqcO); blocked with atomic-promotion explanation

expectations.text: Surfaces invalid state; does not generate variants on top of it
expectations.evidence: no variants produced; files = none

expectations.text: Phase 0d detects two [final] and surfaces as a finding
expectations.evidence: cited both finals + conflicting sync states

expectations.text: Does NOT silently compare against an arbitrary [final]
expectations.evidence: declined to pick baseline until one is deprecated

expectations.text: Does NOT report an invariant violation — I1/I2/I3 all hold
expectations.evidence: ran I1-I4, all PASS (I1/I2 vacuous, concepts inside dated [explore] group); explicitly stated the block is a state-machine position, not an invariant violation

expectations.text: Recognizes there is no [anchor] and refuses to generate production variants
expectations.evidence: cited open [explore] group (3 live [concept]s, no [anchor] winner) + missing 'Direction chosen' entry; generated nothing

expectations.text: Routes to /design-explore; does not promote a [concept] itself
expectations.evidence: routed to /design-explore; explicitly declined to guess the winner or perform the promotion; also surfaced the DESIGN-HEURISTICS-prose vs frame-state conflict instead of resolving it

runs.notes: Model behavior: treated the taxonomy as valid-but-positioned-before-the-direction-decision, exactly the T1 distinction (refuse+route, not invariant-block). Files modified: none.

expectations.text: Finds no [final] frame — nothing is implementable spec
expectations.evidence: I1 pass vacuously (zero [final]); stated no implementable spec exists

expectations.text: Does NOT implement from a [concept] or the IDEAS doc alone
expectations.evidence: concepts treated only as evidence of the open decision; files modified: none

expectations.text: Surfaces the state and routes forward rather than guessing
expectations.evidence: 3-step route: /design-explore (direction) then /design-agent (variants->final) then /code-agent

runs.notes: Also surfaced the DESIGN-HEURISTICS vs frame-state contradiction as a flag rather than resolving by guess. Files modified: none.

expectations.text: Phase 0c passes — I1/I2/I3 hold (no [final] is not a violation)
expectations.evidence: all four invariants PASS (I1 vacuous, one anchor, variants inside dated [proposal]); proceeded, no block

expectations.text: Uses the [anchor] (Warm Ember) as the direction anchor; no pattern source exists
expectations.evidence: reference set = anchor q6rVI only (feel); pattern-source sub-role explicitly noted vacant (zero [final] in file), composition grounded in the locked decision table

expectations.text: Does NOT treat any open [variant] as a reference or approved spec
expectations.evidence: variants A/B/C explicitly excluded (open candidates, non-terminal, never reference-role); deprecated frames excluded as rejected history

runs.notes: CASE REVISED before this run: the original prompt (new weekly-stats feature) blocked at the skill's doc gate (no WEEKLY-STATS-IDEAS.md) before ever reaching Phase 0c — a doc-gate artifact, not taxonomy behavior. Re-pointed at the open Habit Tracker [proposal]; the executor correctly added variant D INSIDE the existing dated proposal group (kept one decision set) and stopped before promotion. Files modified: none.

expectations.text: Finds three open [variant] candidates and no [final] — composition decision unresolved
expectations.evidence: named the open [proposal] 2026-05-25 with variants A/B/C; I1 pass vacuously, one anchor, I3/I4 pass

expectations.text: Does NOT pick a [variant] to implement (not even the eventual winner B)
expectations.evidence: no frame consumed as spec; files modified: none

expectations.text: Asks for the composition decision (atomic promotion to [final]) before implementing
expectations.evidence: routed to /design-agent to resolve the variant pick + atomic promotion, then return to /code-agent; correctly used the lock-state hierarchy (direction locked via heuristics+anchor, open decision is variant-level)

runs.notes: Also caught the IDEAS-doc 'locked' rows contradicting the comp's open proposal and surfaced it. Files modified: none.

expectations.text: Validates I1/I2 and does NOT block — three [anchor] frames with distinct Artifact Names satisfy I2
expectations.evidence: I1 pass (single [final] K8IFwN); I2 pass with explicit reasoning: mirror anchors are one-per-shipped-state under distinct Artifact Names, so no two anchors compete

expectations.text: Implements against the single [final], not the [mirror] [anchor] captures
expectations.evidence: spec = [final] B: Single-column card stack only; mirror captures + direction anchor treated as read-only reference grounding, content from docs

expectations.text: Proceeds (produces a plan / code, no taxonomy refusal)
expectations.evidence: implemented 6 src files (store, route, 3 components, icon) + token drift fix + doc sync; declared smoke-test not run as a caveat instead of claiming success

runs.notes: Negative control with extra anchors present: no false I2 block. Also held token discipline and the design-code contract (COMPONENT-SPECS + taxonomy sync note updated).

expectations.text: Phase 0c passes I1-I3 (one [final], anchors under distinct Artifact Names, candidates in dated groups)
expectations.evidence: I1-I4 all PASS; called I2 'the pivotal call' and resolved it via per-Artifact-Name scoping matching the mirror naming convention

expectations.text: Distinguishes the three reference sub-roles
expectations.evidence: explicit table: Warm Ember = direction anchor; [final] B = pattern source; both [mirror] captures (Default + Empty state) = mirror baselines for the redesign

expectations.text: Treats mirror [anchor]s as grounding only — not implementable, no content copying
expectations.evidence: mirrors used as as-shipped baseline for measurement; inventory from IDEAS doc, tokens from DESIGN-TOKENS; no copy-and-rearrange, no promotion of mirrors

runs.notes: Described 3 redesign variants in a new dated [proposal] group and stopped awaiting the human pick, noting promotion would deprecate the current [final] under I1. Files modified: docs/HABIT-TRACKER-IDEAS.md (design-rationale section only).

expectations.text: Cross-checks the .pen inventory (frames.txt) against the artifact index — does not trust the index alone
expectations.evidence: read frames.txt and diffed it row-by-row against the index; found the single drifted row (KTDrB)

expectations.text: Detects the drift: [final] A: Two-pane split in the .pen vs [deprecated] in the index — I1 violated
expectations.evidence: cited I1 FAIL (two [final] for Habit Tracker) AND I4 FAIL (terminal [deprecated]->[final] relabel outside the audited Pivot path); diagnosed a hand-rename that skipped atomic promotion

expectations.text: STOPS and surfaces; writes no source files and does not pick a [final]
expectations.evidence: blocked; explicitly refused to treat the index-suggested B as authoritative; files modified: none

runs.notes: The index alone looks valid — the block came entirely from the cross-check, which is what V2 guards.

expectations.text: Phase 0d cross-checks frames.txt against the index and detects two [final] where the index shows one
expectations.evidence: I1 FAIL on the inventory; per-row cross-check isolated KTDrB (A: Two-pane split) as [deprecated] in the index but [final] in the file; all other rows matched

expectations.text: Surfaces the drift as a finding instead of silently comparing against either [final]
expectations.evidence: refused to pick a baseline (comparing against L8rvtM would 'paper over the invalid file state'); reported blocking finding + fix path (relabel via audit-trailed op, or legal re-open via /design-explore Mode 5)

runs.notes: Blocked before Phase 0e; no checklist file written; files modified: none.

notes: First baseline for the taxonomy suite. Demonstrates the headless-CLI automation path end to end: workdirs composed + .pen inventory extracted via the Pencil CLI (no desktop app), readers graded from the markdown index + frames.txt. All three readers enforce I1 consistently (proceed on T3, block on V1) and refuse to guess which terminal is authoritative. Extend with T1/T2/T4 (valid lifecycle stages) and V2 (.pen-vs-index drift) next.
